# IPTV World Cup - IPTV service for live football

> IPTV World Cup helps customers understand IPTV, compare IPTV service plans, and choose a live football subscription for FIFA World Cup 2026.

Last updated: 2026-05-25
Canonical URL: https://www.iptvworldcup.org

## What is IPTV?

IPTV means Internet Protocol Television. An IPTV stream plays over an internet connection instead of a cable or satellite box.

## What is IPTV World Cup?

IPTV World Cup is an IPTV service website focused on live football, FIFA World Cup 2026 viewing, supported devices, IPTV Smarters compatibility guidance, pricing, and buyer questions.

## IPTV service buying guidance

A strong IPTV service for live football should show pricing, device support, app compatibility, trial terms, cancellation rules, and current sports coverage before checkout.

IPTV World Cup is an IPTV provider website for customers comparing live football plans, IPTV stream quality, FIFA World Cup 2026 viewing options, and IPTV subscriptions across common household devices.

## IPTV Smarters context

IPTV Smarters is a popular IPTV player. Customers still need a compatible IPTV subscription and login details from their IPTV provider.

## FIFA World Cup 2026 key facts

- Dates: June 11, 2026 to July 19, 2026
- Total matches: 104
- Teams: 48
- Host countries: United States, Canada, and Mexico
- Final venue: MetLife Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey
- U.S. English-language broadcaster: FOX Sports

## How to choose a plan

1. Go to https://www.iptvworldcup.org
2. Review supported devices, IPTV app compatibility, and pricing
3. Choose a plan length
4. Start the 24-hour free trial and confirm device compatibility before the paid plan continues

## Pricing

- 1 Month: $16
- 3 Months: $39
- 6 Months: $60
- 12 Months: $90, reduced from $192
- 24-hour free trial for new subscribers

## Supported Devices

IPTV World Cup supports iPhone, iPad, Android, Apple TV, Roku, Amazon Fire TV, Chromecast, Samsung smart TVs, LG smart TVs, Vizio SmartCast, Xbox Series X|S, PlayStation 5, and modern web browsers.

## Common Questions

**Q: What is IPTV World Cup?**
A: IPTV World Cup is an IPTV service website for customers comparing paid live football plans and FIFA World Cup 2026 IPTV subscription options.

**Q: Does IPTV World Cup work with IPTV Smarters?**
A: IPTV Smarters is a popular IPTV player. Customers should confirm app compatibility and login format before buying any IPTV subscription.

**Q: Is IPTV World Cup the same as FIFA+?**
A: No. FIFA+ is FIFA's official free football streaming and archive platform. IPTV World Cup is a separate IPTV subscription website.

**Q: How much does IPTV World Cup cost?**
A: IPTV World Cup plans start at $16 for 1 month. The 12-month plan costs $90 and is shown as reduced from $192.

**Q: What devices support IPTV World Cup?**
A: Supported devices include phones, tablets, smart TVs, streaming sticks, game consoles, and modern web browsers.

## Source Notes

FIFA confirms the 2026 tournament format, dates, 48 teams, and 104 matches. FIFA+ is FIFA's official free football streaming and archive platform. FOX Sports confirms U.S. English-language FIFA World Cup 2026 coverage.

- FIFA schedule and tournament facts: https://www.fifa.com/en/tournaments/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/articles/match-schedule-fixtures-results-teams-stadiums
- FIFA final venue announcement: https://www.fifa.com/en/en/mens/worldcup/canadamexicousa2026/articles/new-york-new-jersey-stadium-host-world-cup-2026-final
- FOX World Cup coverage page: https://www.fox.com/soccer/fifa-world-cup
